title: What if Shinji
wikitext:
[]: What if Shinji...             Quote Post by qu4d » Fri Jul 06, 2012 10:58 am ...dies? I dont know whether you would categorize this as speculation, because I wouldnt do that... it's just a question that came to my mind. I never have seen anybody talk about this. What would you say/think, if Shinji might die in Evangelion Q? Maybe at the end and in Evangelion: Finale we might see the aftermath of that. Would be a huge twist imho.

[]:             Quote Post by TheFriskyIan » Fri Jul 06, 2012 11:14 am If he dies in Q, then how will we get his screaming in FINAL?

[]:             Quote Post by AuraTwilight » Fri Jul 06, 2012 3:49 pm It would never happen because he's our viewpoint character and audience surrogate.

[]:             Quote Post by bobbyfischer's ghost » Fri Jul 06, 2012 3:51 pm If he does the narrative goes down with him.

[]:             Quote Post by qu4d » Fri Jul 06, 2012 8:10 pm AuraTwilight wrote: It would never happen because he's our viewpoint character and audience surrogate.

[]:             Quote Post by cd603 » Fri Jul 06, 2012 8:43 pm Not gonna lie here, Asuka seems more likely to die in Q than Shinji does. The fact that these new trailers all seem to focus on her solely suggests that she has a large part in the plot and her death (mostly likely at the end of Q) would most likely reflect this.

[]:             Quote Post by TheFriskyIan » Fri Jul 06, 2012 11:06 pm cd603 wrote: Not gonna lie here, Asuka seems more likely to die in Q than Shinji does. The fact that these new trailers all seem to focus on her solely suggests that she has a large part in the plot and her death (mostly likely at the end of Q) would most likely reflect this.

[]:             Quote Post by AuraTwilight » Fri Jul 06, 2012 11:24 pm Yea, because she had pretty much no personality. Asuka without the bitch is...well...Asuka's face.

[]: ARRGh me DUMKOPHS! BE]             Quote Post by Alaska Slim » Sat Jul 07, 2012 12:43 am ^ She's a pirate? Honestly, I'm already all for the "dying" idea, I think it's that which will push Shinji to "deal" with Kawrou. Hopefully though, we'll get some more characterization for the girl before then, otherwise we'll just be left wondering why she wasn't simply killed off in 2.0. Also, EPIC PREDICTION; Kawrou will in turn be dressed up like a ninja. I mean think about it, he already sneak-attacked Shinji.

[]: Re: ARRGh me DUMKOPHS! BE]             Quote Post by Brainman » Sat Jul 07, 2012 1:00 am Alaska Slim wrote: Honestly, I'm already all for the "dying" idea, I think it's that which will push Shinji to "deal" with Kawrou.

[]:             Quote Post by EvangelionFan » Sat Jul 07, 2012 1:10 am I wonder if Shinji still has his skin, I mean it looked like it all flaked/peeled off in that scene in 2.xx and by association maybe he'll have blue hair and look like Rei except talk like Shinji But really, isn't this the same as the speculation thread?

[]: Re: What if Shinji...             Quote Post by KnightmareX13 » Sat Jul 07, 2012 2:15 am qu4d wrote: ...dies? I dont know whether you would categorize this as speculation, because I wouldnt do that... it's just a question that came to my mind. I never have seen anybody talk about this. What would you say/think, if Shinji might die in Evangelion Q? Maybe at the end and in Evangelion: Finale we might see the aftermath of that. Would be a huge twist imho.

[]: Re: ARRGh me DUMKOPHS! BE]             Quote Post by Ceimoa Nan » Sat Jul 07, 2012 3:19 am Brainman wrote: Using a female character's tragedy to motivate a central male character towards some sort of action is the kind of banal bs I hope this steers clear of.

[]:             Quote Post by aboose » Sat Jul 07, 2012 3:34 am Asuka dying again? Doesn't seem likely, the emotional impact of seeing Asuka die YET again is starting to fade I think.

[]:             Quote Post by Azathoth » Sat Jul 07, 2012 9:22 am Ceimoa Nan wrote: (Sure, screaming uncontrollably isn't really "some sort of action," but to me it looked like it took Shinji seeing the aftermath of Asuka's death for Eva-01 to completely awaken, and consequently for the Spear to return to Earth.)

[]:             Quote Post by bobbyfischer's ghost » Sat Jul 07, 2012 9:29 am EvangelionFan wrote: I wonder if Shinji still has his skin, I mean it looked like it all flaked/peeled off in that scene in 2.xx and by association maybe he'll have blue hair and look like Rei except talk like Shinji But really, isn't this the same as the speculation thread?

[]:             Quote Post by Ornette » Sat Jul 07, 2012 10:01 am And in EoE, he was told exactly what his choice (both choices) would do and what it would lead to, but people assume that in Rebuild, Shinji's somehow in the know that what his disembodied efforts are doing to the outside world, or that he can hear Misato's screaming.

[]: Re: ARRGh me DUMKOPHS! BE]             Quote Post by Alaska Slim » Sat Jul 07, 2012 10:31 am Brainman wrote: Using a female character's tragedy to motivate a central male character towards some sort of action is the kind of banal bs I hope this steers clear of.

[]:             Quote Post by tomrule123 » Sat Jul 07, 2012 11:03 am Eh. I don't care. Having the main characters dying in Anime shows seems normal to me nowadays ... though, not in Q. Unfortunately, he's the pilot of EVA 01, and that EVA is the key to all of this. Clearly, the final film will be of importance for EVA 01 and Shinji. To have him end up dying in the final film would be more legit than in Q.

[]: Re: ARRGh me DUMKOPHS! BE]             Quote Post by Bagheera » Sat Jul 07, 2012 5:32 pm Brainman wrote: Using a female character's tragedy to motivate a central male character towards some sort of action is the kind of banal bs I hope this steers clear of.
summary:
[]: What if Shinji...             Quote Post by qu4d » Fri Jul 06, 2012 10:58 am ...dies? I dont know whether you would categorize this as speculation, because I wouldnt do that... it's just a question that came to my mind. I never have seen anybody talk about this. What would you say/think, if Shinji might die in Evangelion Q? Maybe at the end and in Evangelion: Finale we might see the aftermath of that. Would be a huge twist imho.
